---
title: "The Rev. James Edwards Sewell"
---

## The Rev. James Edwards Sewell

**Dates:** (25 Dec 1810-29 January 1903)

### Description

brother of Elizabeth Missing Sewell and warden of New College, Oxford

### Biography

He was a curate of Hursley in 1835; he was Warden of New College from 1860; where his sister Janetta kept house for him.   [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from June 24th [after 1890[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from March 25th 1878
- Letter from Novr 26th 1874
- Letter from July 23, 1873
- Letter from April 21st 1872 [1873?]
- Letter from [1871?]
- Letter from May 14th [1869]
- Letter from April 4th [1866]
- Letter from Novr 11th [1864]
- Letter from Easter Eve [<i>c</i>. 1853-1862]
- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Oct 21st 1844[[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
